title: DNA Extract Wash from Filter Paper
author: Katie Izenour
materials: QIAgen DNeasy Blood and Tissue Kit
Use the QIAgen DNeasy Blood and Tissue Kit, 50 rxn Qiagen Catalog #69504

Protocol Step 4 states: Place a 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tube in a thermomixer or heated orbital incubator with shaking at 900 rpm, 56 °C, for 01:00:00 Instead: Place the 1.5 mL tube in a thermomixer or heated orbital incubator and incubate at 900 rpm, 56 °C, for 02:00:00

10mM Tris-HCL, pH 8.5 is used to wash dried DNA from filter paper. Tris base Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #T1503 (CAS: 77-86-1) To make 500 mL 10mM Tris-HCL, pH 8.5 wash do the following:

steps.title: Using a sterile syringe and needle,...
steps.instruction: Using a sterile syringe and needle, collect 1-5 mL of whole blood from animal's forelimb. Immediately express the contents of the syringe into a new, clean EDTA tube and invert several times to mix.

steps.title: IF EXTRACTING DNA ON THE SAME...
steps.instruction: IF EXTRACTING DNA ON THE SAME DAY AS BLOOD COLLECTION - Place EDTA tube containing fresh blood on ice or at 4 °C until ready to extract. IF EXTRACTING DNA AT A LATER DATE FROM BLOOD COLLECTION- Place EDTA tube containing fresh blood in the freezer at -20 °C until ready to extract; sample will need to be thawed and brought to room temperature before DNA extraction can begin.

steps.title: If using blood frozen in EDTA,...
steps.instruction: If using blood frozen in EDTA, bring it fully to room temperature before beginning to extract Set up a clean workspace in a biosafety cabinet or other appropriate laboratory space for working with biological material and DNA

steps.title: Protocol Step 17 states
steps.instruction: Protocol Step 17 states: Apply 20-100 µL Buffer ATE or distilled water to the center of the membrane. Instead: Apply 100 µL of Buffer AE to wash DNA into microcentrifuge tube

steps.title: Close the lid and incubate at...
steps.instruction: Close the lid and incubate at room temperature for 1 minute. Centrifuge at full speed (20,000 xg; 14,000 rpm) for 1 minute. Instead : Close the lid and incubate at room temperature for 5 minute. Centrifuge at full speed (20,000 xg; 14,000 rpm) for 1 minute.

steps.title: The DNA is recovered at the...
steps.instruction: The DNA is recovered at the final step of the extraction process when buffer 'AE' is used. Take care not to accidentally discard the flow-thru of this step, the AE wash product contains the actual DNA

steps.title: Wear clean gloves and remove individual...
steps.instruction: Wear clean gloves and remove individual filter paper disk with 'ears' (each Cellabs Tropbio Filter Paper Blood Collection Disks™- Disk has 6 individual ears attached to it) from the sheet. Filter paper will need a clean, dry, flat area to dry Overnight after application of the DNA extract, ensure an appropriate bench space is prepared before removing Filter Paper from packaging.

steps.title: use a sharpie or other permanent...
steps.instruction: use a sharpie or other permanent marker to write your sample ID on the center part of the disk

steps.title: if extract is not already at...
steps.instruction: if extract is not already at room temperature, bring the DNA extract to room temperature

steps.title: Vortex or invert microcentrifuge tube containing...
steps.instruction: Vortex or invert microcentrifuge tube containing DNA extract for 00:00:05 to mix DNA evenly. On each 'ear' of the filter paper disk, pipette 6 µL of DNA extract

steps.title: Allow Filter Paper to dry Overnight...
steps.instruction: Allow Filter Paper to dry Overnight , or longer on a clean, dry, flat surface The remaining DNA in the microcentrifuge tube can be discarded or stored in a freezer.

steps.title: After drying overnight, dried filter paper...
steps.instruction: After drying overnight, dried filter paper can be placed individually in self-closing plastic bags and sealed tightly. The individual plastic bags can be stored in a larger self-closing plastic bag containing a pelleted desiccant to minimize the risk of moisture getting to the filter paper. Dried filterpaper cards sealed in individual plastic bags Dried filter paper stored in individual plastic bags with silica

steps.title: DNA on filter paper can be...
steps.instruction: DNA on filter paper can be stored at room temperature for up to 6 months

steps.title: to make 500mL 10mM Tris-HCL, pH 8
steps.instruction: to make 500mL 10mM Tris-HCL, pH 8.5 (Starting with 121.1 g/mol tris powder) measure 0.6055 g tris base powder and pour into a sterile glass bottle add about 300mL DI water to the bottle with the tris base powder

steps.title: Use a pH meter to adjust...
steps.instruction: Use a pH meter to adjust the pH of the tris base in water until a pH of 8.5 is achieved.

steps.title: Once the appropriate pH is achieved,...
steps.instruction: Once the appropriate pH is achieved, add DI water to bring total volume to 500mL

steps.title: Loosely place a cap on the...
steps.instruction: Loosely place a cap on the glass bottle containing the tris base and autoclave it on settings appropriate for your machine

steps.title: Allow tris base to cool to...
steps.instruction: Allow tris base to cool to room temperature following completion of autoclave

steps.title: In a clean, sterile 2mL microcentrifuge...
steps.instruction: In a clean, sterile 2mL microcentrifuge tube, place one whole filter paper 'ear' containing dried DNA extract.

steps.title: Pipette 150µL of sterile Tris HCL @pH 8
steps.instruction: Pipette 150µL of sterile Tris HCL @pH 8.5 (made in step 7 above) into the microcentrifuge tube containing the filter paper 'ear'

steps.title: ensure the filter paper ear is...
steps.instruction: ensure the filter paper ear is completely submerged in the liquid, close lid, vortex thoroughly for 20 seconds

steps.title: Ensure the filter paper ear is...
steps.instruction: Ensure the filter paper ear is submerged following vortex, with lid closed, place tube on rocking platform at 4C, 500rpm for 2 hours

steps.title: following 2 hours of rocking, the...
steps.instruction: following 2 hours of rocking, the DNA will be suspended in the eluate in the tube.

steps.title: Prepare a clean and sterile bench space for PCR
steps.instruction: Prepare a clean and sterile bench space for PCR

steps.title: Prepare mastermix following the protocol for...
steps.instruction: Prepare mastermix following the protocol for the Qiagen Taq PCR Master Mix Kit (Catalog #201445). Taq PCR Master Mix Kit Qiagen Catalog #201445 MasterMix: %s %s thaw (if necessary) and vortex the microcentrifuge tube with the washed DNA Sample before adding it to the mastermix use 10µL of the washed DNA (from step 9 of this protocol) as the 'sample' in the mastermix

steps.title: Thermal Cycle lid 105°C, 95°C 3min,...
steps.instruction: Thermal Cycle lid 105°C, 95°C 3min, 95°C 30sec, 60°C 30 sec 72°C 45sec, repeat 34x, 72°C 10min, 4°C infinite hold or placed in 4°C refrigerator until gel electrophoresis

steps.title: 2% Agarose Gel Electrophoresis with Biotium...
steps.instruction: 2% Agarose Gel Electrophoresis with Biotium Gel Red Gel Red Nucleic Acid Gel Stain Biotium Catalog ##41003 and 1kb ladder 1kb ladder Biotium Catalog #99962
